name: Fish and Leek Chowder
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Potatoes; peeled and cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a large soup pot.
2. Add the onion and cook over moderate heat until soft, about 3 minutes.
3. Add the carrots and cook for several minutes.
4. Add the bell pepper, Anaheim chili, leeks (white only), and bay leaf; cook for an additional 3 minutes or so.
5. Stir in the tomatoes, potatoes, fish stock, white wine, black pepper, thyme, and parsley.
6. Bring to a low boil, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, until the potatoes are nearly cooked, about 10 to 20 minutes.
7. This is when you should prepare the fish; have it ready to add on the day of serving.
8. Simmer the chowder base with the fish and scallops for an additional 5 to 15 minutes, or until the fish is just cooked through (avoid overcooking).
9. Stir in the evaporated milk gently and serve immediately.
10. Garnish with washed parsley leaves and hot pepper sauce if desired.
